text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's signature racewear<n>has arrived.
Her cool, street-style<n>outfit does a great job of
accentuating her natural sharpness.
choice_data_list:
Good thing you let them know what kind of design
you wanted.

Good thing you let them know what kind of design
you wanted.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Well, duh. It's not like I'd wear<n>clothes that don't
look good on me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And I still feel the same since thattime.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin, Taishin, Taishiiin! Is it trueyou're getting your own signatureracewear?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All your hard work's paying off! I'm<n>so happy for
youuu!
Ugh, can it! I told you guys not to yell!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, this is cause for<n>celebration. Such high
emotions are<n>only to be expected.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What kind of design do you have in<n>mind for it?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I looked through some magazines,<n>and it seems
that these are popular<n>lately.

The page she shows us features<n>bright,
eye-catching costumes and<n>cute garments that
would be perfect<n>for concert performances.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I hate all of those. They're not my<n>style.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Forget those. I want something more<n>like what I
usually wear.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! But it's your signature<n>racewear! Are you
sure you don't<n>want something really awesome
with<n>a lotta oomph?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna wear anything gaudy<n>or be some
loser who has to depend<n>on her racewear to win.

I'm good enough as I am, and I don't<n>need
anything other than my own<n>strength to be a better
racer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see. And you want your signature<n>racewear to
reflect that, yes? I quite<n>like that logic, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I sorta got caught up in the moment<n>and
exaggerated a little, but none of<n>what I said was a
lie.

I'm not gonna cater to anyone, nor<n>am I gonna
rely on some fabric... I'll<n>win my races all on my
own!
choice_data_list: You can lean on me, though.
You can lean on me, though.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna cater to anyone, nor<n>am I gonna
rely on some fabric... I'll<n>win my races all on my
own!
choice_data_list: You can lean on me, though.
You can lean on me, though.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Thanks, Captain Obvious.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I've finally reached a point where<n>people's eyes
are on me...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And I'm gonna keep rising up to the<n>very peak of
the Twinkle Series!
choice_data_list: Yeah! And I'll be with you all the way!
Yeah! And I'll be with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Um, don't get ahead of yourself.

Since Narita Taishin wants to run and<n>it's the
perfect chance to break in her<n>outfit, we head over
to the training<n>track.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hup, hup, hup...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Taishin sure is amazing today, isn't<n>she? It's like
her signature racewear<n>boosted her intensity or
something.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's impossible to tear my eyes<n>away from
her!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That so?

(Good! I'll steal everyone's attention<n>and devour
them whole!)

And so, the starting shot signaling<n>Narita Taishin's
resurgence blazes<n>into the sky with a roaring
bang.

I tell Narita Taishin that trainers like<n>myself exist to
support and help her<n>get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Urk...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I guess I will if I'm in themood. But I'm not looking to getchummy or anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get stronger through my<n>will alone. You
support me as you see<n>fit.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's all there is to it, right?
choice_data_list: I'm fine with that. Let's get stronger—together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Yup.

She gives me a noncommittal nod...<n>But still, she
acknowledges me as her<n>trainer, and that's good
enough for<n>me.

Hey, what are you grinning about?<n>Get weird with
me, and I'll kick you to<n>the moon!

There's still a lot of work to do, and I<n>don't
necessarily have Narita<n>Taishin's full trust yet...

But we've sworn in our hearts to<n>keep moving
forward the only way<n>we can.
